add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a yellow highlight annotation over a specified text rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-pdf-.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to First PDF Page
add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky note (text annotation) to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-project-overview-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add Project Overview Bookmark to PDF
add-project-overview-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a bookmark named "Project Overview" that points to page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-nested-bookmarks-pdfbookmarkedito.title: Create Nested Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-nested-bookmarks-pdfbookmarkedito.description: Demonstrates how to add a hierarchical set of bookmarks (a parent chapter with child sections) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-rectangle.title: Add JavaScript Alert to PDF Rectangle Annotation
add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-rectangle.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a rectangular annotation in a PDF using PdfContentEditor, creating a clickable area that displays an alert.

add-javascript-action-to-pdf-form-button.title: Add JavaScript Action to PDF Form Button
add-javascript-action-to-pdf-form-button.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript calculation to a PDF form button using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page as PNG
extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract the first image found on page 2 of a PDF and save it as a PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all images embedded in a PDF document and save them as separate image files with Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to place a PNG logo as an image stamp at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Red Font and Semi‑Transparent Background
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Shows how to create a red "Confidential" text stamp with a semi‑transparent background and place it centered on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reposition-stamp-on-pdf-page.title: Reposition Stamp on PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
reposition-stamp-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF 10 mm from the left margin with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-invoicenumber-with-uuid-page-6.title: Replace InvoiceNumber with UUID on PDF Page 6
replace-invoicenumber-with-uuid-page-6.description: Shows how to replace the exact case‑sensitive text "InvoiceNumber" on a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document.

set-viewer-preference-continuous-zoom-10.title: Set Viewer Preference to Continuous Layout with 100% Zoom
set-viewer-preference-continuous-zoom-10.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preference to a single‑page continuous layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

get-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-zoom.title: Get PDF Viewer Preferences and Default Zoom
get-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preferences such as page layout and retrieve the default zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed an external file (Terms.pdf) into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without creating a visible annotation.

remove-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Attachment from PDF Document
remove-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file (attachment) from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

apply-password-protection-disable-printi.title: Apply Password Protection and Disable Printing in PDF
apply-password-protection-disable-printi.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password using 256‑bit AES and disable all permissions, including printing, using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-restrict-.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Restrict Editing and Annotations
set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-restrict-.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to configure document privileges that enable text copying while disabling form field editing and annotation modifications.

add-author-title-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-author-title-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the Author and Title metadata fields, and save the updated document.

update-pdf-xmp-metadata-custom-project-s.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata with Custom Project Schema
update-pdf-xmp-metadata-custom-project-s.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, registering a custom XMP namespace, adding project identifier and version fields, and saving the updated document.

fill-acroform-customername.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field "CustomerName"
fill-acroform-customername.description: Shows how to open a PDF, fill the AcroForm text field named "CustomerName" with "Acme Corporation", and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

check-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.title: Check a Checkbox Field in a PDF Form
check-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to programmatically set the "TermsAccepted" checkbox to true in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-express-shipping-radio-button.title: Set Express Shipping Radio Button in PDF Form
set-express-shipping-radio-button.description: Shows how to select the 'Express' option of the 'ShippingMethod' radio button in a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.description: Shows how to extract page 7 from a PDF and save it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multipage-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
convert-pdf-to-multipage-tiff-lzw.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to convert an entire PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression.

convert-jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG to Single-Page PDF
convert-jpeg-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a JPEG image and embed it into a new PDF document as a single page with default margins using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Multiple Copies and Landscape Orientation
print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to send a PDF to the default printer, configuring two copies and landscape page orientation via printer and page settings.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and add a red rectangle annotation to every page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

batch-replace-confidential-with-public.title: Batch Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in PDF Files
batch-replace-confidential-with-public.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, load each document, replace every occurrence of the word "Confidential" with "Public", and save the modified files to an output directory.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, extract all images from each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save the images into separate subfolders named after the source PDFs.

batch-add-javascript-alerts-to-rectangle.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alerts to Rectangle Annotations
batch-add-javascript-alerts-to-rectangle.description: Shows how to process several PDF documents, locate rectangle (square) annotations on each page, and attach the same JavaScript alert action to them using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preferen.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preferen.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a directory and use PdfContentEditor to set the viewer preference so each PDF opens in full‑screen mode.

batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and encrypt each with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.description: The example loads a PDF document and converts each page to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI, saving the images to an output folder.

batch-reposition-stamps-to-top-center.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top‑Center in PDFs
batch-reposition-stamps-to-top-center.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, retrieve existing stamps on each page, and move them to a top‑center position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, create a web link annotation on page two, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field so that the Total field is recalculated automatically when the Quantity field value changes.

extract-images-page5-grayscale-jpeg.title: Extract Images from Page 5, Convert to Grayscale, and Save as JPEG
extract-images-page5-grayscale-jpeg.description: Loads a PDF, converts page 5 to grayscale, extracts all images from that page using the PdfExtractor facade, and saves each image as a JPEG file.

center-pdf-stamp-on-page-8.title: Center a PDF Stamp on Page 8
center-pdf-stamp-on-page-8.description: Shows how to calculate page and stamp dimensions and place a PDF stamp so it is centered horizontally and vertically on the eighth page of a document using Aspose.Pdf facades.

replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text inside annotation contents on selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the Facades API.

hide-toolbar-and-menubar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-and-menubar.description: Shows how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-pdf-attachment-with-description.title: Add PDF Attachment with Description
add-pdf-attachment-with-description.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF document using PdfContentEditor, specifying a custom MIME type and description, then saving the updated file.

remove-attachments-by-pattern.title: Remove PDF Attachments Matching a Filename Pattern
remove-attachments-by-pattern.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate embedded file attachments whose names end with "_old.pdf", delete those attachments, and save the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to apply 128‑bit AES encryption to a PDF and forbid editing, printing and other operations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity.

add-custom-xmp-projectid-metadata.title: Add Custom XMP ProjectID Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-projectid-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, register a custom namespace, add a ProjectID field, and save the document with the new XMP metadata.

add-image-stamp-from-base64-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp from Base64 to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-from-base64-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to decode a Base64 image, create a stamp, and place it on page 3 of a PDF at a 50 mm offset using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp to PDF with Arial Font
add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a multiline text stamp using Arial 14 pt in blue and apply it to all pages of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to import field values from a JSON file into a PDF form and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-200.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to Transparent PNGs at 200 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-200.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting pages 2‑4, and converting each to a 200 DPI PNG image with a transparent background.

print-pdf-silently-to-network-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Network Printer
print-pdf-silently-to-network-printer.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer facade and send it to a network printer identified by IP address without displaying any print dialog.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to add a rectangle (square) annotation with a dashed border and 50% opacity to page six of an existing PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.title: Add Page-Open JavaScript to Log Page Number
add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.description: Demonstrates attaching a JavaScript action to each PDF page that writes the current page number to the console when the page is opened, then saves the updated document.

generate-pdf-image-catalog.title: Generate PDF Image Catalog with Thumbnails
generate-pdf-image-catalog.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF, creates a new PDF and adds each image as a 200x200 thumbnail on separate pages, optionally with a caption.

reposition-stamp-to-paragraph-baseline.title: Reposition Stamp to Paragraph Baseline on Page 5
reposition-stamp-to-paragraph-baseline.description: Shows how to locate the baseline of the first paragraph on page 5 using TextFragmentAbsorber and then move an existing stamp so its Y‑coordinate aligns with that baseline.

replace-dates-regex-pdf.title: Replace MM/DD/YYYY Dates with YYYY-MM-DD in PDF using Regex
replace-dates-regex-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor with a regular expression to locate dates in MM/DD/YYYY format and replace them with YYYY‑MM‑DD across all pages of a PDF document.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to enable the thumbnails pane, fit the window to the page width, and set a default zoom factor for a PDF document.

update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to retrieve existing XMP metadata from a PDF, modify the Dublin Core creator field, and save the PDF with the updated metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-aes-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add AES Encrypted Attachment to PDF
add-aes-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates encrypting a file with AES‑256 and attaching the encrypted data to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, including a custom description field.

remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned document.

create-three-level-nested-bookmarks.title: Create Three-Level Nested Bookmarks in PDF
create-three-level-nested-bookmarks.description: Shows how to add a hierarchy of section, subsection, and sub-subsection bookmarks to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-page-10.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp to Page 10
add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-page-10.description: Shows how to place a centered text stamp with underline decoration and a yellow background on the tenth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Semi-Transparent Image Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply an image stamp with 45° rotation, 80% opacity, and a specific (100,200) position to all pages of a PDF document.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-config.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Configuration File
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-config.description: Shows how to read default values from a simple key=value configuration file and populate a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24-bit BMP Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rasterizing each page to a 24-bit BMP at a specified DPI, and saving the images to disk.

print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with duplex (double‑sided) mode enabled and collated multiple copies.

add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill
add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.description: Shows how to create a rectangle annotation with a light‑gray fill color and a 1 pt border on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor, including generation of a placeholder PDF if the source file is missing.

add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Validation Button to PDF Form
add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that checks required fields and displays an alert if any are missing.

add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmark to PDF
add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a bookmark in an existing PDF that opens an external website when selected, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide Scrollbars and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.description: Shows how to set viewer preferences to hide UI elements such as scrollbars and to remove page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

extract-viewer-preferences-save-json.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to JSON
extract-viewer-preferences-save-json.description: The example reads viewer preference flags and the current zoom factor from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades, translates the layout flag to a readable name, and stores the results in a JSON configuration file.

add-attachment-update-moddate.title: Add Attachment and Update Modification Date in PDF
add-attachment-update-moddate.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and set the document's modification date to the current UTC time for auditing purposes.

remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

sign-and-encrypt-pdf-with-certificate.title: Sign PDF with Certificate and Encrypt Using Certificate‑Based Encryption
sign-and-encrypt-pdf-with-certificate.description: The example signs a PDF using a PKCS#1 certificate and then encrypts the signed document with certificate‑based AES‑256 encryption, requiring a digital signature to open the file.

add-text-stamp-with-shadow.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to First PDF Page
add-text-stamp-with-shadow.description: Shows how to place a text stamp with a shadow effect at the top of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-from-stream.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF from Stream
add-image-stamp-from-stream.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, binding the image directly from a stream without saving it to disk.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images with 150 DPI Using PdfConverter
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into progressive JPEG images at 150 DPI using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

convert-png-images-to-multi-page-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
convert-png-images-to-multi-page-pdf.description: Shows how to combine a sequence of PNG files into a single PDF document, adding each image as a separate page with default margins.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges Using PrintDocument
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to print specific page ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10) of a PDF by configuring Aspose.Pdf printing and page settings and invoking the PdfViewer.PrintDocumentWithSettings method.

add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.title: Add Semi-Transparent Stamp Annotation to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least three pages, and adds a yellow stamp annotation with 60% opacity to page three before saving the document.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages Using PdfExtractor
extract-images-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from each page of a PDF and save them with a page‑and‑index based naming scheme using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

replace-text-preserve-font-style.title: Replace Text While Preserving Font Style in PDF
replace-text-preserve-font-style.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text in a PDF using PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font, size, and color on the affected pages.

add-attachment-data-relationship.title: Add Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-attachment-data-relationship.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF document and set its AFRelationship to Data using Aspose.Pdf.

add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.title: Add Corporate Branding XMP Metadata to PDF
add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to embed custom XMP metadata—including a logo URL and brand color—into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Page Four
add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.description: Shows how to create a multiline text stamp, right‑align it at the bottom of a specific page (page 4) using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API, and save the modified PDF.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Shows how to download an image from an external URL and apply it as a stamp on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Thumbnails with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and render the pages to 300 DPI PNG images with a transparent background for UI thumbnails.

merge-jpeg-images-into-pdf.title: Merge JPEG Images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
merge-jpeg-images-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine multiple JPEG files into a single PDF document, placing each image on its own page using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfFileMend facade.

add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Dash Pattern and Opacity
add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a square (rectangle) annotation to the first page of a PDF, configure a custom dash border and set 75% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that shows a confirmation dialog before the form is submitted.

add-help-bookmark-url-to-pdf.title: Add a URL Bookmark to PDF
add-help-bookmark-url-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a bookmark named "Help" that opens an online documentation URL and saves the updated PDF.

disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.title: Disable Zoom Controls and Set Fixed Zoom Level in PDF
disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.description: Shows how to hide PDF viewer UI elements that provide zoom controls and enforce a fixed 100% zoom level using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-file-attachment-set-creation-date.title: Add File Attachment and Set Creation Date
add-file-attachment-set-creation-date.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then set the attachment's creation date with the core Aspose.Pdf API.

add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Department XMP Metadata to PDF
add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, add a custom XMP metadata field called Department with the value Finance, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Red Bold Text Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a bold red text stamp, center it horizontally, and apply it to page five of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream and Scale to 50%
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Shows how to load an image into a memory stream, create an ImageStamp, scale it to 50%, position it, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from XML Using XPath
fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting values with XPath, and populating matching AcroForm fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-green-circle-annotation-page-two.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page Two
add-green-circle-annotation-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a green‑filled circle annotation with a 3 pt border to the second page of a PDF document.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add File Attachment to Existing PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade and save the modified PDF.

embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.title: Embed Memory Stream as PDF Attachment using PdfContentEditor
embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.description: Shows how to add a file held in a MemoryStream as an attachment to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over files in a folder and add each one as an attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-document-attachment-with-description.title: Add Document Attachment with Description to PDF
add-document-attachment-with-description.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF and set a descriptive label using the PdfContentEditor facade.

add-custom-mime-type-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Custom MIME Type Attachment to PDF
add-custom-mime-type-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file into an existing PDF and assign a custom MIME type using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfContentEditor, deleting all embedded attachments, and saving the cleaned document.

add-new-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add New Attachment to PDF Without Removing Existing Attachments
add-new-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a document attachment to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor while preserving any existing attachments.

refresh-pdf-attachments.title: Refresh PDF Attachments
refresh-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to delete all existing attachments from a PDF and add a new set of files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

attach-network-downloaded-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Network-Downloaded File to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
attach-network-downloaded-file-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates downloading a file into a byte array and adding it as a document attachment to an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

add-large-attachment-and-monitor-memory.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-and-monitor-memory.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file larger than 10 MB to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verifies that memory consumption stays within a defined limit.

add-attachment-and-retrieve-name.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Retrieve Its Name
add-attachment-and-retrieve-name.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using the Facades API and then extract the attachment's file specification name for verification.

delete-all-attachments-verify-count.title: Delete All PDF Attachments and Verify Count
delete-all-attachments-verify-count.description: Demonstrates how to remove every attachment from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then confirm that the attachment count is zero with PdfExtractor.

add-attachment-and-list-names.title: Add Attachment to PDF and List Attachment Names
add-attachment-and-list-names.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor, save the document, and then retrieve and display all attachment names with PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-attachments-verify-unicode-d.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Verify Unicode Descriptions
extract-pdf-attachments-verify-unicode-d.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded file attachments from a PDF using PdfExtractor and read their Unicode description metadata with the Document class.

add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF using PdfContentEditor
add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.title: Add Attachment and Store Checksum in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF, retrieve its MD5 checksum, and save the checksum as custom metadata using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.title: Encrypt PDF Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF file with user and owner passwords and then attaching the encrypted document to another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-and-verify-attachment-in-pdf.title: Add and Verify Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-attachment-in-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, extract the attachment using PdfExtractor, and compare its bytes to the original file for verification.

enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Enable CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to set the CenterWindow viewer preference so a PDF opens centered using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

hide-pdf-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Hide PDF Menu Bar Using Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to set the HideMenubar viewer preference on a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades so the menu bar is hidden when the document is opened.

set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades so the document opens automatically in full‑screen mode.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outline.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outline Panel
set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outline.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's viewer preference to display the document outline (bookmarks) by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-multiple-viewer-preferences.title: Set Multiple Viewer Preferences for a PDF
set-multiple-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to combine viewer preferences (CenterWindow and HideToolbar) using a bitwise OR, apply them to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, and save the result.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to read the viewer preference flags from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and output them to the console.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to read a PDF's current viewer preferences, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save
change-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to modify viewer preferences of a PDF using PdfContentEditor and save the updated document to a new file.

export-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer Facade
export-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Shows how to load a PDF with the PdfViewer facade, optionally modify it, and save the resulting document directly to a MemoryStream for downstream processing.

hide-pdf-toolbar.title: Hide PDF Toolbar Using Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-toolbar.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference with PdfContentEditor so the toolbar is hidden when the PDF opens.

hide-scrollbars-pdf-viewer.title: Hide Scrollbars and UI Elements in PDF Viewer
hide-scrollbars-pdf-viewer.description: Demonstrates using PdfContentEditor to set viewer preferences that hide scrollbars, menu bar, and toolbar for a cleaner display on small‑screen devices.

set-pdf-title-displaydoctitle-viewer-pre.title: Set PDF Title and Enable DisplayDocTitle Viewer Preference
set-pdf-title-displaydoctitle-viewer-pre.description: Loads a PDF, sets its document title, and applies the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the window caption.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to XML
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, reads its viewer preference flags using PdfContentEditor, and writes the values to an XML configuration file.

apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to PDFs from JSON Config
apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.description: Shows how to read viewer preference names from a JSON configuration, map them to Aspose.Pdf ViewerPreference flags, and apply the combined settings to each PDF using PdfContentEditor.

hide-toolbar-and-menubar__v2.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-and-menubar__v2.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar and HideMenubar viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor to produce a minimalistic PDF UI.

retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edits.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Incremental Edits
retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edits.description: Shows how to modify PDF viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor and read back the current preference value after each change.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single-page layout and save the modified file.

set-continuous-view-mode.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
set-continuous-view-mode.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to use continuous (single‑column) view mode using PdfContentEditor.

map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-toggles.title: Map PDF Viewer Preferences to Interactive Toggles
map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-toggles.description: Loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, reads its current viewer preferences, lets the user toggle individual flags via console prompts, and saves the updated preferences to a new PDF.

toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to load a PDF, toggle the FullScreen viewer preference using PdfContentEditor, and save the modified file.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-encrypted-pd.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to an Encrypted PDF
apply-viewer-preferences-to-encrypted-pd.description: Shows how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF using PdfFileSecurity, apply a viewer preference (e.g., hide the menu bar) with PdfContentEditor, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Export PDF Viewer Preferences to XML
export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: Shows how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF with PdfContentEditor and serialize the flags into an XML document for legacy system integration.

hide-pdf-navigation-panels.title: Hide PDF Navigation Panels by Setting PageMode to UseNone
hide-pdf-navigation-panels.description: Demonstrates how to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note text annotation at coordinates (100,200) on the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-clickable-web-link-into-pdf.title: Insert Clickable Web Link into PDF
insert-clickable-web-link-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add a rectangular hyperlink that opens an external website to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v3.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v3.description: Demonstrates how to create an image stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it to the second page of a PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Helvetica Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a blank page, and place a free‑text annotation using Helvetica 12‑pt blue text.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Shows how to place a yellow highlight markup over a defined rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

underline-phrase-on-page-four.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
underline-phrase-on-page-four.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on page 4 of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's text extraction and Facades markup APIs.

add-red-square-annotation-with-transpare.title: Add Red Square Annotation with Transparency to PDF Page
add-red-square-annotation-with-transpare.description: Demonstrates how to add a square annotation with a red border and semi‑transparent fill to the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to draw a thick green circular annotation around a diagram on page six of a PDF document.

insert-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.title: Insert Line Annotation with Arrowheads in PDF
insert-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.description: Shows how to add a line annotation with arrowheads at both ends to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-hover-popup-annotation.title: Add Hover Popup Annotation to PDF
add-hover-popup-annotation.description: Shows how to create a popup annotation that appears when the user hovers over it using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-multiple-annotations-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Annotations to a PDF in Batch
add-multiple-annotations-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a batch of text, highlight, and link annotations to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and annotation classes.

add-semi-transparent-text-annotation.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Annotation to PDF
add-semi-transparent-text-annotation.description: Shows how to place a text annotation on a PDF page and set its opacity to 0.5 (50 % transparent) using Aspose.Pdf.

add-stamp-annotation-opacity.title: Add Stamp Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-stamp-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to place a stamp annotation on a PDF page and set its opacity (and optionally blend mode) using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF and rotate it 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

create-rubber-stamp-custom-appearance.title: Create Rubber Stamp Annotation with Custom Appearance
create-rubber-stamp-custom-appearance.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page and set its appearance using a custom appearance stream from another PDF via PdfContentEditor.

add-text-annotation-3-point-border.title: Add Text Annotation with 3‑Point Border to PDF
add-text-annotation-3-point-border.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation with a custom 3‑point solid border to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-dashed-rectangle-annotation.title: Create Dashed Border for Rectangle Annotation
create-dashed-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle annotation with a dashed border to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example draws each side of the rectangle as a dashed line.

add-light-gray-background-to-text-annota.title: Add Light Gray Background to Text Annotation
add-light-gray-background-to-text-annota.description: Demonstrates creating a text annotation on a PDF page with PdfContentEditor and setting its background color to light gray for improved readability on dark pages.

rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF and rotate it 90° clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation.description: Shows how to create a clickable file‑attachment annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-javascript-alert-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation.description: Shows how to create a JavaScript link annotation that displays an alert message when the PDF is opened or clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tooltip-annotation.title: Create Tooltip Annotation in PDF
create-tooltip-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note annotation with a tooltip that appears on mouse hover using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-dashed-line-annotation.title: Add Dashed Line Annotation with Custom Dash Pattern
add-dashed-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates using PdfContentEditor to insert a red dashed line annotation with a custom dash pattern into a PDF diagram.

add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-list.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet List to PDF
add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-list.description: Demonstrates how to add a closed popup annotation containing multi‑line bullet‑point text to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor.

apply-45-degree-rotation-to-pdf-stamp.title: Apply 45° Rotation to a PDF Stamp Annotation
apply-45-degree-rotation-to-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a rotated text stamp to all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add RTL Text Annotation to PDF
add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a right‑to‑left Arabic text annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade and then save the updated document.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a local hyperlink annotation that jumps to another page within the same PDF using PdfContentEditor.

add-red-border-highlight-annotation.title: Add Red Border Highlight Annotation to PDF
add-red-border-highlight-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation with a bright‑red border to a specific area of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-free-text-annotation-with-html.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with HTML to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation containing rich HTML content to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

custom-annotation-appearance-stream.title: Create Custom Annotation Appearance Stream with Vector Graphic
custom-annotation-appearance-stream.description: Builds a temporary PDF containing vector shapes and uses its bytes as a custom appearance stream for a rubber‑stamp annotation added to an existing PDF.

add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API and store custom author information in the annotation's title field.

add-text-annotation-utc-creation-date.title: Add Text Annotation with UTC Creation Date to PDF
add-text-annotation-utc-creation-date.description: Demonstrates adding a TextAnnotation to a PDF page and setting its CreationDate to the current UTC time using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-subject-to-pdf-text-annotation.title: Assign Subject to PDF Text Annotation
assign-subject-to-pdf-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation with a Subject property to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

lock-pdf-annotation.title: Lock PDF Annotation to Prevent Editing
lock-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF, set its Locked flag using Aspose.Pdf, and save the document so the annotation cannot be modified by end users.

hide-annotations-enable-fullscreen.title: Hide Annotations and Enable Full‑Screen Viewer Preference
hide-annotations-enable-fullscreen.description: Demonstrates how to hide all annotations in a PDF and set the viewer preference to full‑screen using Aspose.Pdf Document API and PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.title: Replace "Draft" with "Final" in a PDF
replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using PdfContentEditor to replace all occurrences of a word, and saving the modified document.

replace-text-on-page-preserve-font.title: Replace Text on Page While Preserving Font Style
replace-text-on-page-preserve-font.description: Shows how to locate a text fragment on page 2, capture its original TextState, and replace it with new text while keeping the original font, size, and color using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.title: Replace Text Using Regular Expressions Across PDF Pages
replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace text that matches a regular expression on all pages of a PDF while preserving the original formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-on-page-three.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-on-page-three.description: Shows how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

replace-phrase-bold-style.title: Replace Phrase with Bold Style While Preserving Font Size
replace-phrase-bold-style.description: Shows how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF, retrieve its original font size, and replace it with a new bold‑styled phrase using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

insert-blank-page-add-header.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header to PDF
insert-blank-page-add-header.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new blank page at a specific position in a PDF and add a header annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-page-from-pdf.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the updated file.

reorder-last-page-to-first.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Moving Last Page to First
reorder-last-page-to-first.description: Shows how to move the last page of a PDF to the beginning of the document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor Insert and Delete methods.

merge-pdfs-add-text-annotation.title: Merge PDFs and Add Text Annotation
merge-pdfs-add-text-annotation.description: The example creates placeholder PDFs if they are missing, adds a yellow text annotation to the first PDF, and then merges the first and second PDFs into a single output file.

split-edited-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split Edited PDF into Single-Page Files
split-edited-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split a PDF into separate one-page documents, preserving any annotations on each page.

insert-image-annotation-with-caption.title: Insert Image Annotation with Caption into PDF
insert-image-annotation-with-caption.description: Shows how to load a PDF, place a StampAnnotation containing an image at specific coordinates, and assign a caption via the annotation's Contents property.

add-image-attachment-and-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-image-attachment-and-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to embed an image file as a document attachment and then reference the same image in a stamp annotation using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

batch-add-text-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Text Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-text-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to read JSON configuration and apply a text watermark to every PDF file in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-annotations-from-json.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF from JSON
batch-add-annotations-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read a JSON file that defines various annotation types, create text, link, and highlight annotations on specified pages, and save the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-with-attachment-and-viewer-p.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password After Adding Attachment and Viewer Preferences
encrypt-pdf-with-attachment-and-viewer-p.description: Demonstrates attaching a document, changing viewer preferences, and then encrypting the PDF with a user password using Aspose.Pdf facades.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF, modify its content (add a text annotation), and then encrypt it again using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-file-attachment-to-secured-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to a Secured PDF
add-file-attachment-to-secured-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a password, adding a file attachment, and saving the updated document.

add-document-attachment-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Add Document Attachment to Multiple PDFs
add-document-attachment-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process a list of PDF files, adding the same file attachment to each document using PdfContentEditor.

apply-viewer-preferences-multiple-pdfs.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through several PDF files and set the same viewer preferences (hide menu bar, hide toolbar, no page mode) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

batch-rotate-pdfs-concurrently.title: Batch Rotate PDFs Concurrently with PdfPageEditor
batch-rotate-pdfs-concurrently.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files in parallel, rotating each page by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation to PDFs
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, delete all embedded attachments, and add a standardized free‑text disclaimer annotation to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-pipeline-attachments-viewer-annotati.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Pipeline: Add Attachments, Set Viewer Preferences, and Insert Annotations
pdf-pipeline-attachments-viewer-annotati.description: Demonstrates a configurable pipeline that loads a PDF, adds file attachments, applies viewer preference flags, and creates various annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference in PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF document and configure the viewer to open the attachment panel in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-attachment-to-pdf-async.title: Asynchronously Add Document Attachment to PDF
add-attachment-to-pdf-async.description: Shows how to attach a file to an existing PDF and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades while keeping the UI responsive by executing the operation on a background thread.

add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Large Stream Attachment to PDF with Minimal Memory Usage
add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a large file as a PDF attachment using a FileStream so Aspose.Pdf reads the data in chunks, reducing memory consumption.

add-network-attachment-with-retry.title: Add Network Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
add-network-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to download a file from a URL with retry on timeout and embed it as a file attachment annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-stamp-verify-pdf-integrity.title: Add Image Stamp and Verify PDF Integrity
add-image-stamp-verify-pdf-integrity.description: The example loads a PDF, applies a semi‑transparent image stamp to each page, saves the modified file, and then compares SHA‑256 hashes of the original and modified PDFs to confirm the files differ.

compare-pdf-file-sizes.title: Compare PDF File Sizes and Validate PDFs
compare-pdf-file-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to compare the byte sizes of an original and edited PDF and verify that both files are valid PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, export them to XFDF, and serialize the XFDF XML into a JSON file for external analysis.

import-annotations-from-json-into-pdf.title: Import Annotations from JSON into PDF
import-annotations-from-json-into-pdf.description: Shows how to deserialize annotation definitions from a JSON file, create TextAnnotation objects, and add them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor and confirming its presence after saving using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

viewer-preferences-persistence.title: Persist Viewer Preferences After Editing PDF
viewer-preferences-persistence.description: Demonstrates how to set viewer preferences on a PDF using PdfContentEditor, save the changes, and verify that the preferences persist after reopening the document.

verify-text-annotation-position.title: Verify Text Annotation Position in PDF
verify-text-annotation-position.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextAnnotation, saves it, then loads the PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor to assert that the annotation's rectangle coordinates match the expected values.

log-pdf-edit-operations.title: Log PDF Edit Operations with PdfContentEditor
log-pdf-edit-operations.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to modify a PDF and record each edit action with a timestamp and file name in a log file.

add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while checking for missing files and handling errors gracefully.

replace-text-in-pdf-with-pdfcontentedito.title: Replace Text in PDF with PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf-with-pdfcontentedito.description: Shows how to replace text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and ensures the editor is disposed in a finally block to prevent memory leaks.

replace-text-in-pdf-using-pdfcontentedit.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf-using-pdfcontentedit.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, replacing all occurrences of a string, and saving the edited document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor within a using block for automatic disposal.

add-image-and-document-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Document Attachment to PDF
add-image-and-document-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert an image onto a PDF page using PdfFileMend and then add a hidden file attachment with PdfContentEditor.

pdf-editor-wrapper-simplified-editing.title: Simplified PDF Editing with PdfEditorWrapper
pdf-editor-wrapper-simplified-editing.description: Demonstrates a wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor that simplifies adding annotations, replacing text, deleting images, and saving a PDF document.
